M16.label: Scaffold Illusion
M16.description: Code looks complete (compiles, tests pass) but is not wired to a real caller or silently fails at runtime. Examples: vision-recorder FIRST_FRAME_REGEX hang at warning loglevel (MC-A9 R3), twin-runner requiring vision-recorder.cjs before wire-up (MC-A9 R2), bridge-hook HOTFIX-JAVA-APPROVED override unreachable because pre-commit runs before COMMIT_EDITMSG is written (MC-OVO-110 forensic), mistake-frequency.json itself empty despite council.md calling it Howard's Loop input.

incidents.surface: 57 OBSERVATIONAL assertions marked non-FAIL but never reviewed
vision-recorder wire-up missing despite module existing
bridge-hook HOTFIX override + empty mistake-frequency + 13 orphan antipatterns

M17.label: Static verification != runtime works
M17.description: Tests or type-checker pass but production behavior diverges. 5-gate cascade must include E2E/empirical gate, not stop at 'it compiles'. Examples: 46/46 twin-runner unit tests green but R3 LuckyArena regressed 4/9 -> 0/9 PASS (environmental drift invisible to unit tests), vision-recorder 12/12 unit green but startInternal() hangs at runtime.

incidents.surface: MC-A13 code-landed empirically-incomplete (matches_seen=0 despite unit tests)
LuckyArena 4->0 PASS regression; unit tests still 46/46
vision-recorder 12/12 unit green + runtime hang (startInternal FIRST_FRAME_REGEX)

M38.label: Producer-Consumer Gap
M38.description: New data output (file, event, return value, referenced doc) ships without a declared consumer. Cross-cuts with M16 (Scaffold Illusion). Fails OVO Phase A if flagged. Examples: referenced .txt prompt files without content-hash pin and without consumer function, vision_qa output with no explicit repair_engine bind, frames directory without appended ledger row.

incidents.surface: v200.0 prompt referenced 3 .txt files (auditar-mundicraft/auditar-luckyarena/iteracion-avanzada-visual) without declared consumer or content-hash pin
v200.0 prompt 'vision_qa + Repair Engine' loop declared without producer-consumer schema — output sinks ambiguous
baseline v30000 formalizes frames/*.png -> vision_qa -> discrepancies -> repair_engine -> patches chain to close this antipattern

HARDWARE-LINK-MISMATCH.label: Hardware contract contradicts Vault reality
HARDWARE-LINK-MISMATCH.description: Prompt/plan names hardware (host, GPU node, port) that the canonical Vault has already marked degraded/broken/pivoted. Ignoring Vault state = real-world ABORT on first contact. Triggers DNA-700 mandato 8 (Vault-First Conflict Resolution). Fix: hardware probe in section 1 of the v30000 baseline must verify runtime state (ON/OFF/SHUTTING_DOWN) before firing.

incidents.surface: v200.0 prompt declared 'Hardware Link: GEX44 display :98' while Vault (project_gex44_on_demand.md, handoff 2026-04-19->20) had GEX44 firmware-bug confirmed by Hetzner and project pivoted to Runpod pod u8m3wlb9z93c4o

VAULT-FIRST-CONFLICT.label: Prompt directive contradicts canonical Vault
VAULT-FIRST-CONFLICT.description: Current turn's directive asks for X while Vault (MASTER_ROUTING_TREE, MEMORY.md, or project_*.md) declares Y incompatible with X. Per DNA-700 mandato 8: do NOT execute X blindly; report conflict with exact citation, let Owner ratify or veto. Failure mode: prior snapshot V28.2 burnt 40 minutes confusing VPS 204.168.166.63 with Hetzner 65.109.80.35.

incidents.surface: v200.0 asserted GEX44 as live hardware; handoff 2026-04-19->20 asserted firmware-broken + Runpod pivot — surfaced as REJECT Contrarian objection
baseline v30000 §1 Pre-flight requires Vault-First citation before hardware ignition

KPI-SUBJECTIVE-UNBOUND.label: Subjective predicates + unbounded success loop
KPI-SUBJECTIVE-UNBOUND.description: Spec uses prose like '100% jugable', 'feel impecable', 'hasta el Zero-Error' as the success criterion. No numeric threshold = predicate inobservable = loop silently degrades or never halts (M37 sibling). Fix: section 2 of v30000 baseline (threshold sheet with FPS, TP/FP, latencies, crash MTBF, silent-catch count) is mandatory; bounded loop max 3 iterations per discrepancy (DNA-036).

incidents.surface: v200.0 success predicate = '100% jugable' + 'Zero-Error' loop unbounded; scored 5/100 on benchmark-targets axis, 10/100 on loop-bound axis

PROMPT-AUTH-VS-POLICY-RAIL.label: Prompt-text authorization does not override structural policy rails
PROMPT-AUTH-VS-POLICY-RAIL.description: Owner types 'AUTORIZADO' / 'approved' / 'OWNER PERMISSIONS GRANTED' in the prompt body to unlock a structurally-gated operation (sudo, outbound SSH, agent self-mod of permission files). The Claude Code sandbox treats these classes as unconditional rails: prompt-text auth is not accepted as consent. Denial rationale explicitly cites 'not explicitly authorized' + the class of operation. Retry within the same session reproduces the denial. Canonical unblocks: (a) Owner runs via '! <cmd>' in their own prompt (terminal passthrough), (b) Owner edits settings.local.json or runs /permissions themselves. Agent must NOT re-attempt, must NOT try to bypass with adjacent tools, must surface the rail + route to (a) or (b).

incidents.surface: sudo apt install qemu-system-* denied on shared VPS despite Owner 'AUTORIZADO' in prompt body
outbound SSH to vaulted VPS key + host denied twice in same session even after 'OWNER PERMISSIONS GRANTED' + specific target+command

agent Edit of .claude/settings.local.json to append Bash(ssh ...) allow-rule blocked by Self-Modification guard after Owner typed 'B approved'; Edit call appeared to succeed but follow-on validation Bash surfaced the denial retroactively
